risks.note: All declared pilots are modeled, not run; no real operational signal exists yet.
Signals (TASK 2) are declared; runtime emits none of them today.
No sandbox-tier telemetry sink is provisioned (layer 25 incident-trace channel still pending).
Reviewer fatigue indicator cannot be computed without a workload meter.
Hotspot detection requires aggregation infrastructure not yet built.
Causal-graph gap detection requires reasoning-trace export (layer 12).
132 candidates pending elevation; pilot signal will increase, not decrease, this queue without reviewer capacity.
Operator + reviewer consoles remain design-only (layer 24); pilots cannot run without minimum surfaces.
Pilot exit criteria are declared; no automated check verifies a pilot has met them before closure.
Carry-over from layer 24: supervision receipts not yet emitted by runtime.
